file.header: These variables may be changed anytime during a run, they control jobs that are dependent on case.run.

entry.desc: When TRUE, CUPiD will generate time series files from history output
When TRUE, CUPiD will generate diagnostic plots
When TRUE, CUPiD will generate web pages from the diagnostic plots
Conda environment to use when running CUPiD notebooks
Conda environment to use when running CUPiD tools
First year of output to include in CUPiD analysis
Number of years of output to include in CUPiD analysis
First year of baseline output to include in CUPiD analysis
Number of years of baseline output to include in CUPiD analysis
Baseline case to use in CUPiD analysis
Baseline case root to use in CUPiD analysis
Example to use in CUPiD analysis
Boolean value that determines whether or not diagnostics for all components are run
Boolean value that determines whether or not ATM diagnostics are run (if CUPID_RUN_ALL is FALSE)
Boolean value that determines whether or not OCN diagnostics are run (if CUPID_RUN_ALL is FALSE)
Boolean value that determines whether or not LND diagnostics are run (if CUPID_RUN_ALL is FALSE)
Boolean value that determines whether or not ICE diagnostics are run (if CUPID_RUN_ALL is FALSE)
Boolean value that determines whether or not ROF diagnostics are run (if CUPID_RUN_ALL is FALSE)
Boolean value that determines whether or not GLC diagnostics are run (if CUPID_RUN_ALL is FALSE)
Boolean value that determines whether or not ADF diagnostics are run (if CUPID_RUN_ALL is FALSE)
